description: Implement the Swipe-to-Refresh pattern in the BookStream application. Add the `androidx.swiperefreshlayout:swiperefreshlayout:1.1.0` dependency to the app-level build configuration. Update the main activity layout to include a SwipeRefreshLayout with the ID `@+id/swipe_refresh`. In MainActivity.kt, configure the refresh listener to call `viewModel.refreshData()` and manage the refresh indicator's visibility.
